Name: The Urban School of San Francisco
Tagline: Home - Urban School of San Francisco
About: We’re glad you have found our virtual home. Though no website can truly convey the fullness or the distinctiveness of the Urban experience, it’s our hope that you start gaining a feel for how we think about education and the role you play in it.
Philosophy: Urban School of San Francisco seeks to ignite a passion for learning, inspiring its students to become self-motivated, enthusiastic participants in their education – both in high school and beyond. Learning is an active, joyful process of discovery where students are challenged to ask essential questions, solve problems in disciplined and creative ways, and construct substantive understandings under the guidance of passionate and inspiring teachers.
Outcomes: Urban School graduates are accepted into top-tier universities such as Stanford, UC Berkeley, and Harvard. Alumni pursue successful careers in diverse fields, including technology, arts, and public service.
Admissions: Prospective students must submit an online application, including transcripts and recommendations, by the January deadline. Interviews and campus visits are part of the holistic admissions process, emphasizing a student's fit with Urban's community and values.
Quote: At Urban, we have an unflinching belief in the power of adolescence.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Urban School curriculum provides an exceptionally strong foundation in college preparatory subjects. Many of our classes have distinctive features that set them apart as particularly challenging and comparable to college level work.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Urban’s academic program seeks to involve students in their broader community — the school, the city, the world — and develop in them a sense of social responsibility. Beyond a core curriculum that builds a firm framework of general knowledge and conceptual understanding in each of the disciplines, the Urban program gives students the opportunity to develop deep knowledge and fluency with skills and ways of thinking across disciplines.
Performance.Academic Integration: Urban’s curriculum is extensive and inclusive, including core academic classes, as well as an unusually large number of specialized courses, advanced electives and creative arts courses usually found at the college level. See our 2025-26 Curriculum Guide here.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from The Urban School of San Francisco are consistently admitted to prestigious universities like Stanford and UC Berkeley, often receiving accolades in national academic competitions. Alumni excel in fields such as technology, arts, and public service.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The Urban School boasts state-of-the-art science labs, a fully equipped theater, and dedicated art studios, fostering a dynamic learning environment. Students also benefit from access to modern athletic facilities and collaborative workspaces.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The Urban School utilizes a comprehensive assessment system with regular progress reports and parent-teacher conferences to ensure student success. Personalized feedback is provided to guide students in achieving their academic goals.
